title: Poochandi Lyrics Masss Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Masss Poochu poochu poo Poochandi Lyrics
Singer(s): Yuvan Shankar Raja & Pooja
Lyrics: Gangai Amaran

pakkam iruppaandi
aettu kadal thaandi.
angirukkum porulayum
adha vittu navuthittu
varuvaan paandi.

avan nalla kaedi
enna venum eduthukko
ippa inga kondu vandhu
tharuvaan di.

onnula palavaatti
adikkura pala lootti.
kannula dagul kaatti
kadhai adikkura
kadha mudikkura
badavaa di.

unakku thaan theriyaatti
onnumey puriyaatti
kanakkuthaan pala kootti
kannu thatti vittu
enni eduppadhu
ivan thaan di.

kanakku pottaa
adhu sariyaachu.
en kadhaikkum adhu
sariyaachu.
adhu eduthu koduthuttu
thaduthu mudikkudhu
potti neyalaachu.

ada irukku illaiyinu
nenaikkaadha.
un nenappa eppozhudhum
koraikkaadha.
adhu maranji kidakkudhu
enakku theriyudhu
adhayum marandhidaadha.

varavu illa selvu
idha kootti kooti
konji kolavu.

Maelogamo, boologamo
engengo pogiren.
mun jenmamo
en jenmammo
yaedhendru paarkiren.
ennangalaal
idhayangalaal
endrun ondraagirom.
vannangalaa
vaasangalaa..

maarudhalai paarthaayaa,
vaerulagam
thondri ponadhey.
naalai marandhu
vaekai marandhu
maayamaai aanadhaey.

kaathu kaathu
avan irundhaandi.
ippa kaiyyil lucku
vara jeichaandi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Poochandi?

The song Poochandi is a lively dance track that celebrates joy and fun, with catchy lyrics that invite listeners to join in the festivities.

What is the context of the song in the movie Masss?

In Masss, the song is featured during a vibrant party scene, enhancing the celebratory mood of the film.

Who are the artists behind Poochandi?

The song is sung by AV Pooja and features music by Yuvan Shankar Raja, with lyrics penned by Gangai Amaran.

When was Poochandi released?

Poochandi was released on May 23, 2015, as part of the Masss soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Poochandi from Masss is an energetic dance number that perfectly encapsulates the spirit of celebration. With its catchy lyrics and upbeat tempo, it invites listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The vibrant composition by Yuvan Shankar Raja, combined with AV Pooja's lively vocals, creates an atmosphere of joy and festivity. This track is a highlight in the film, resonating with themes of happiness and togetherness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poochandi from Masss is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With AV Pooja's captivating vocals and Yuvan's infectious beats, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the unique blend of catchy lyrics and energetic rhythm that makes this song a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Catch him if you can, he has won.
Talking a lot, he has gained a lot.
He is nearby, crossing the sea. He will come back laughing with what he has.
He will ask for what he wants and bring it here now.
He is making a lot of noise, showing off many things. He is telling stories with his eyes, finishing the tale with a twist.
You don't know anything, you can't understand. He is counting many things and making you think.
If you count, it will be correct. It is correct for my story too. It has been taken and given, and it has been wrapped up.
Don't think about whether it exists or not. Your thoughts are always unbroken. I know it is dead, but I won't forget it.
There is no arrival, only loss, gathering and wasting.
This is a new and fresh day, bringing a lot of joy.
Catch him if you can, catch him if you can, it's magical.
Where am I going, to heaven or earth? I wonder about my past lives and my current life. We have become one with our hearts and colors.
Have you seen the change? A different world has started. Tomorrow will be forgotten, and the effort will turn into magic.
Catch him if you can. Look carefully and catch him.
He is lucky now, he has won.
Catch him if you can, catch him if you can, it's magical.
